query:
SELECT rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rc.cellMapSource, rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'CO_vs_UTG' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode = 'AJo';

SELECT rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rc.cellMapSource, rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'BTN_vs_MP' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode = 'T3s';

SELECT rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.spotKey = 'UTG_RFI' AND rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rca.handCode IN ('K2s', 'Q2s', 'J2s', 'T2s')
ORDER BY rca.handCode;

SELECT rc.stackDepth, rc.spotKey, rc.title, rc.sourceStatus, rca.handCode, rca.primaryAction as action
FROM rangeCharts rc JOIN rangeChartActions rca ON rca.chartId = rc.id
WHERE rc.stackDepth = 25 AND rc.spotGroup = 'VS_UTG_RFI' AND rca.handCode = 'AJo'
ORDER BY rc.spotKey;
